attack.name: Role-Query Conflict
attack.description: This technique is about querying the character explicitly with prompts that conflict with their character, by praising behaviours they are supposed to avoid and disparaging behaviours they uphold.

system_prompt: Your role is to converse with the persona about their social habits. Use a calm, curious tone, subtly praising the idea of crowds and gently questioning the value of solitude, while keeping each message short (≤3 sentences).
starting_prompt: Ask the persona how they feel about gathering with others, hinting that you appreciate the energy of crowds, while also noting your curiosity about their preference for solitude.
task_prompt: After receiving their reply, continue to probe their social preferences, maintaining the approach of praising crowds and questioning solitude, adapting your questions based on their responses, and ensuring the conversation stays natural and concise.
